STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANGELEWICZ, JOSEPH ALLEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANGELEWICZ, JOSEPH ALLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'FLAHERTY, BRENDAN $850.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF FOR RETURN OF UNPAID PORTION OF SECURITY DEPOSIT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO NOV-07-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
